candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above EBIT, but it is generic and not labelled as cost of sales / cost of revenues / materials-related. Relative to the selected COGS bucket 'Materials and consumables', this appears more likely to sit outside COGS than to be a COGS-specific D&A add-on.
Candidate label is relevant to D&A, but the preview shows no visible values and no indication it is tied to COGS. No clear evidence it should be added separately to the selected COGS row.
Potential residual D&A row, but the preview shows no visible values and no indication it belongs to COGS. Using it would be speculative and risks double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only populated D&A line is a generic 'Depreciation' line at the same operating level as other expense rows, not clearly part of 'Materials and consumables'.

candidates.why: Separate populated operating D&A line above EBIT at the same level as 'Payroll expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'. Since the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket includes only those two rows, this depreciation appears outside that selected bucket and should be added separately to avoid omission.
Relevant D&A label, but no visible values in the excerpt. There is not enough evidence that a separate amount should be added beyond the explicit populated depreciation row.
Could be a summary/residual D&A line, but it has no visible values in the excerpt. Prefer the explicit populated 'Depreciation' row and avoid speculative inclusion.

variables.notes: OK. Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS were 'Payroll expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' only. The populated 'Depreciation' row is a separate operating expense line before EBIT and does not appear embedded within those selected rows. No separate R&D expense row is present, and XRD is empty.
